atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline Tailwind utility classes into a custom CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Load a legacy Tailwind JavaScript config file for compatibility.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Define a custom variant that can be reused in Tailwind class names.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Load a legacy Tailwind plugin for compatibility.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Reference another stylesheet so Tailwind can resolve theme values and utilities.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Register additional content sources for Tailwind class detection.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Declare Tailwind design tokens directly in CSS.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Define a custom Tailwind utility in CSS.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Apply an existing Tailwind variant inside a CSS rule.
